name: Google Chrome
description: Cross-platform web browser developed by Google, built on the open-source Chromium project and the Blink rendering engine.

years.notes: First major redesign (March 2011) — the original 2008 three-dimensional glossy mark was flattened: shadows and highlights were softened, and the three colored petals around a blue sphere were retained but simplified. Used through August 2014.
Material Design refresh (September 2014) — flatter petals, brighter primary colors aligned with Google's Material palette, light-gray ring around a Material Blue center. Used through March 2022.
February 2022 refresh — drop shadow removed, more vibrant gradient-tinted petals, slightly larger central blue circle. Current Chrome mark (unchanged through 2026).

notes: Skipped 2008 original glossy three-dimensional mark: no authoritative true-vector SVG source on Wikimedia Commons, archive.org, or major mirrors — only raster references on Logopedia and 1000logos. Per the no-invent rule the millésime was omitted rather than redrawn. brandColor uses the central Material Blue (#1A73E8) per Google's brand convention, even though by surface area the colored petals dominate the 2022 mark.
